prompt: Create a vertical 2:3 high-fashion editorial photo of an adult female model wearing a dramatic liquid dress made from glossy pink paint. The model stands centered in a studio against a plain light gray wall, captured from mid-thigh upward with her body slightly turned and one arm extended to the right. Her face is intentionally hidden by a flat opaque square censor block in a skin-tone beige color, while her long wavy hair is blonde at the crown fading into vivid hot pink lengths. The dress should look like a living splash of bubblegum pink and translucent pale pink: an off-shoulder bodice with a strapless neckline and a huge swirling skirt formed from sheets of liquid, ribbons of paint, droplets, beads, splashes, and thin tendrils frozen in midair. Count and emphasize 5 main sweeping liquid shapes: one wide horizontal band across the chest, one large curling splash rising on the left, one broad skirt sheet flaring to the lower left, one bright magenta skirt panel flaring to the right, and one lower back wave with dripping edges. Add many small suspended droplets around the figure, especially along the left splash and right side. The model wears sparkly jewelry including a choker necklace, bracelets, and small hair ornaments. Use direct on-camera flash, glossy wet highlights, slight film grain, hard shadows on the wall, a glamorous 2000s music-video mood, realistic skin and fabric-liquid physics, high detail, dynamic frozen motion, no visible text, no watermark.
